title: phyllanthus × collinum-misuku
intro: Phyllanthus × collinum-misuku is a hybrid plant species, also known as the Misuku bush or the Phyllanthus hybrid, resulting from the cross between Phyllanthus niruri and Phyllanthus fraternus. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its high concentration of flavonoids, tannins, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its various health benefits. The Misuku bush has been traditionally used to treat various ailments, including fever, digestive issues, and liver problems, due to its antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and hepatoprotective properties. Herbal preparations of Phyllanthus × collinum-misuku can be made into teas, infusions, or capsules, and are often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
